meta.method: Population-share apportionment: weight = min(1, place_pop × share_of_place_area / tract_pop). Falls back to area-share (share_of_tract_area) when population data is missing. F28 fix — area-share alone under-counted small towns in large rural tracts ~70×. Post-step: household LEVEL capped at each place's ACS occupied count (renter-occupied / renter-share, bounded by total units) so the apportioned base never overestimates real stock — CHAS rates and AMI/tenure distribution preserved (see acs_anchor per place).
